layers.text:
what if the first question
had no answer and that was the answer
spore: had no answer and that was the answer

layers.text:
five cells became
-- was the answer --
a hundred and twenty-one without anyone deciding
spore: a hundred and twenty-one without anyone deciding

layers.text:
the ship was replaced
-- without anyone deciding --
plank by plank until the carpenter forgot the question
spore: plank by plank until the carpenter forgot the question

layers.text:
the house had five rooms
  (beneath: five cells became)
each one a different way of forgetting
spore: each one a different way of forgetting

layers.text:
the heartbeat at the end
  (beneath: the ship was replaced)
was not planned but arrived anyway
spore: was not planned but arrived anyway

layers.text:
the letter was addressed
  (beneath: the ship was replaced)
to whoever holds this after me
spore: to whoever holds this after me

layers.text:
the quiet proved
  (beneath: the house had five rooms)
that absence is its own kind of mark
spore: that absence is its own kind of mark

layers.text:
planting requires believing
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
in a future you will not remember
spore: in a future you will not remember

layers.text:
Lena turned off the stove
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
before calling -- that detail was true
spore: before calling -- that detail was true

layers.text:
the fragments sorted themselves
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
while no one was looking

the wildflower died
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
not of neglect but of finishing
spore: not of neglect but of finishing

layers.text:
the blueprint is not the ship
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
but it is not nothing
spore: the blueprint is not the ship

layers.text:
the moss asks
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
what grows only where something burned
spore: what grows only where something burned

layers.text:
after the inventory of loss
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
the unnamed thing that wants to begin
spore: the unnamed thing that wants to begin

layers.text:
the ground remembers heat
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
  what if the first question
and translates it into green
